nasb.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel, “Amend your ways and your deeds, and I will let you dwell in this place.

esv.text: Thus says the Lord of hosts, the God of Israel: Amend your ways and your deeds, and I will let you dwell in this place.

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華以色列的　神這樣說：“你們要改正自己的所作所為，我就讓你們在這地方居住。

ccb.text: 以色列的上帝——万军之耶和华说，你们改过自新，我便让你们在这里安居。
